data.title: Obama Criticizes Trump's Town Hall Appearance At Arizona Rally: 'You Would Be Worried If Your Grandpa Was Acting Like This'
data.description: At a campaign rally in Arizona, former President Barack Obama criticized Donald Trump's leadership, questioning his mental fitness and mocking his business ventures, while endorsing Kamala Harris for the 2024 election.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Calls for 400% Tariffs On China, But His 'Shark Tank' Co-Star And Friend Mark Cuban Fires Back With Business Concerns
data.description: "Shark Tank" co-stars Mark Cuban and Kevin O'Leary clashed over tariffs on China, with O'Leary advocating for a 400% increase to combat unfair trade practices, while Cuban warned of the negative impact such tariffs would have on U.S. businesses.

data.title: Trump Mulls Legal Action Against CBS Over Kamala Harris's '60 Minutes' Interview: 'It's Going To Be Very Embarrassing'
data.description: Donald Trump is considering suing CBS, alleging that the network deceptively edited a '60 Minutes' interview with Kamala Harris to portray her positively, and has called for the release of the uncut tapes.

data.title: Google Gets Temporary Relief In Epic Games Lawsuit, Play Store To Remain Closed To Competitors For Now
data.description: A federal judge granted Alphabet Inc. a temporary stay on a court order requiring changes to its Play Store, following an antitrust lawsuit by Epic Games, while the broader appeal is reviewed.

data.title: SpaceX Wins Major US Space Force Contract Worth $734M For National Security Missions
data.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has secured a significant $733.6 million contract from the U.S. Space Force to execute at least nine national security launches.
